title: Hershii - Extendable Curtain Rod for Windows and Showers, Oval Head, Clothes Hanging Rod for Closets and Wardrobes, No Drilling, Tube Diameter: 25.4 mm, Grey, 40-60 cm
features: 25.4mm steel pipe diameter, ideal for hanging clothes and shower curtain
No drilling installation, no tools required, easy to install.
It can be used in bathroom, kithen, closet, wardrobe, living room, etc.
Holds window blackout curtain and also can used as drying rack too.
